CVE-2023-26132.title: Versions of the package dottie before 2.0.4 are vulnerable to Pro ...
CVE-2023-26132.summary: Versions of the package dottie before 2.0.4 are vulnerable to Prototype Pollution due to insufficient checks, via the set() function and the current variable in the /dottie.js file.
